message:
fix(sling): serialize concurrent hook writes with per-assignee flock (#3114)

The per-bead sling lock (tryAcquireSlingBeadLock) prevents double-sling
of the same bead but does not prevent concurrent slings from racing on
the same assignee's hook_bead row in Dolt. Under concurrent batch sling
to the same polecat, Dolt silently rolled back conflicting hook writes,
leaving polecats with empty hooks even though sling reported success.

Fix: acquire a per-assignee blocking flock (assignee_<agent>.flock) in
.runtime/locks/sling/ around the hookBeadWithRetry call. This serializes
hook writes for the same target polecat across concurrent sling invocations.

Co-Authored-By: Chris Deal <cdeal@mines.edu>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
